question: What point is 3 left and 5 up from (2, 1)?

question: Data set has values 10, 20, 30. What value added makes the mean 20?
hint: Mean=sum÷count. Median=middle when sorted (avg of two middles if even count). Mode=most frequent. Range=max-min.

subject: Math
question: Complementary angles sum to?
hint: Triangle angles sum to 180°. Regular polygon interior angle = (n-2)×180÷n. Supplementary angles = 180°.
